caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits Barbados
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing 16 kt winds and 5.3 ft wave heights with a 100% rain probability, while nearby Martinique has 13 kt winds. I expect the strong easterly swell to continue impacting these Lesser Antilles ports, with significant wave action and heavy rain affecting ship operations in the region.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 21 kt winds with 5.2 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Cadiz has 19 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail with dominant NE swell direction and minimal rain impact across the region.
